textByHash.9b7cb5aac09a3424a98937434d7b93d5f7b1197b: I ain't no little boy. Me dad, Steve, said I was big enough to take care of these 'ere wyverns, as the pal- palint-palintililiolog- those blokes from the museum are too scared of them.
textByHash.5ce5307ce9ed11014be77214beba9bc5cd03087b: Yeah, whatever. I know how to look after myself, my entire family are slayer guardians or something like that.
textByHash.7ad580c63a640478b9c31af9a27ba8587933072f: To guard the wyverns of course.
textByHash.6494a0846b676d854557bf6252dee9818c9ce118: From people like you who just want to kill 'em.
textByHash.c3504f1051d872fd8e7d9bc109fec1f9b0bfd634: They have lives too. They were created for a purpose. But whatever, you can only kill these ones if the Slayer Masters say you can.
textByHash.97e3849e44056a8778d6e652536851542e94f22a: Well, it's kinda a family tradition you might say. Plus I'm good at looking after wyverns and fast enough to weave between their legs and not get hurt.
textByHash.b7fdc180bddfd8e08a07c6293c243c8fa57eab01: Hey! Leave them alone! My dad Steve will beat you up unless a Slayer Master has given you special permission.
